info.name: Semi Phase 3 - Complete API Collection
info.description:
Full backend API.
Base URL: http://localhost:5000

super_admin: superadmin@academy.com / SuperAdmin123!

Exam Lifecycle:
  Pending → Approved → SchedulePublished → (generate hall tickets)
            ↘ Rejected (any point by board)

request.description: 200=healthy, 503=DB down
Sends 6-digit OTP. Valid 10 mins.
role: admin | board
status: Approved | Rejected. Prereq: paymentStatus=Completed.
Access: institute only. Prereq: Institute Approved.
isEligible: remittedToAcademy=true AND attendance>=75% AND thesisApproved=true

formdata.description: Required only if isForeignGraduate=true AND fmgeClearanceStatus=Cleared

request.description: Enrolls student. utrNumber + paymentReceipt are MANDATORY.
Access: institute, admin, board, super_admin
Returns: feeStatus, attendance>=75%, thesisApproved, isEligible, decision.
Institute sees own. Admin/board/super_admin see all.

item.name: GET Fee Records for a Student

formdata.description: e.g. Examination Fee | Course Fee - Semester 1

request.description: Access: institute only
INR 50,000/pending student. Access: institute only.

formdata.description: Optional JSON array. Omit = all pending students.

request.description: Sets remittedToAcademy=true on covered students.

item.name: 📝 Exam Applications
item.description:
Full lifecycle:
1. Institute: POST /apply (Pending)
2. Board: PUT /:id/review — Approve/Reject
3. Board: PUT /:id/publish-schedule — venue, center, time (SchedulePublished)
4. Institute: POST /:id/generate-hall-tickets
5. Institute: GET /:id/hall-tickets
6. Institute: GET /:id/hall-tickets/:hid/download

Filters on GET /: ?status=Pending&courseId=&batchId=

request.description:
Institute sees own only. Board/Admin/SuperAdmin see all.
Filters: status, courseId, batchId

Full details including subjects, schedule info, and populated students.
Institute can only access own applications.

item.name: POST Apply for Exam (with Fee + Subjects)

formdata.description: MANDATORY — JSON array of eligible student IDs

request.description:
Status → Pending

Per-student eligibility: remittedToAcademy=true AND attendance>=75% AND thesisApproved=true

Access: institute only

response.name: 201 Application Submitted
400 Missing subjects
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"At least one subject is required"}

response.name: 400 Missing fee receipt
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Exam Fee Receipt upload is mandatory."}

response.name: 400 Ineligible students
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Cannot apply for exam. One or more selected students are ineligible."}

request.description:
Updatable: subjects (array), studentIds (array — all must be eligible)
Restriction: Only Pending applications.
Access: institute only

response.name: 200 Updated
400 Not Pending
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Only Pending applications can be updated."}

request.description:
Cancels and deletes a Pending application.
Access: institute only

response.name: 200 Deleted
400 Not Pending
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Only Pending applications can be cancelled/deleted."}

request.description:
UC 4.2 Step 1 — Board reviews the exam application.

Fields:
- status: "Approved" | "Rejected"
- scheduledDate: required when Approving (ISO date)
- remarks: optional notes

Status transitions:
- Pending → Approved
- Pending → Rejected

Access: board, admin, super_admin

response.name: 200 Approved
200 Rejected
400 Missing scheduledDate
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"A scheduled date is required to approve the exam application."}

response.name: 400 Not Pending
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Cannot review an application with status \"Approved\". Only Pending applications can be reviewed."}

request.description:
UC 4.2 Step 2 — Board publishes the full exam schedule.

PREREQUISITE: Application must be Approved (Step 1 done first).

Fields:
- examVenue: MANDATORY — full venue name/address
- examCenter: MANDATORY — exam center code/name
- reportingTime: MANDATORY — e.g. "08:30 AM"
- scheduledDate: optional override of date set in Step 1

Status transitions:
  Approved → SchedulePublished

After this, the institute can generate hall tickets.

Access: board, admin, super_admin

response.name: 200 Schedule Published
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Exam schedule published successfully. Institute can now generate hall tickets.",
  "data": {
    "_id": "64f1...",
    "status": "SchedulePublished",
    "scheduledDate": "2026-09-15T00:00:00.000Z",
    "examVenue": "Examination Hall A, Mumbai Convention Centre",
    "examCenter": "Mumbai Central Examination Hub",
    "reportingTime": "08:30 AM",
    "schedulePublishedAt": "2026-06-26T12:30:00.000Z",
    "subjects": ["Anatomy","Physiology","Emergency Medicine"]
  }
}

response.name: 400 Not Approved
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Cannot publish schedule for an application with status \"Pending\". Application must be Approved first."}

response.name: 400 Missing examVenue
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Exam venue is required"}

response.name: 400 Missing examCenter
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Exam center is required"}

response.name: 400 Missing reportingTime
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Reporting time is required"}

request.description:
UC 4.3 — Generates and PERSISTS hall tickets in MongoDB.

PREREQUISITE: status = SchedulePublished (Steps 1 + 2 done).

Idempotent: re-running regenerates tickets (old ones deleted first).

Each ticket contains:
- ticketId (unique: HT-{enrollmentId}-{timestamp})
- studentName, enrollmentId, contactNumber, photoUrl
- instituteName, instituteAddress
- courseName, batchYear
- subjects (array)
- examDate, examVenue, examCenter, reportingTime

After this, use GET /:id/hall-tickets to list them.

Access: institute (own), board, admin, super_admin

response.name: 200 Hall Tickets Generated
400 Not SchedulePublished
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Hall tickets can only be generated after the schedule is published. Current status: \"Approved\"."}

request.description:
UC 4.3 — Returns all persisted hall tickets for this exam application.

Auto-saves first ticket _id into {{hallTicketId}} variable.

Access: institute (own), board, admin, super_admin

response.name: 200 Hall Tickets List
400 Not Generated Yet
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Hall tickets have not been generated yet for this application."}

request.description:
UC 4.3 — Returns a single hall ticket with full details.

Access: institute (own), board, admin, super_admin

response.name: 200 Hall Ticket
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Hall ticket retrieved successfully",
  "data": {
    "_id": "64f2...",
    "ticketId": "HT-SEMI-2025-4231-1719400000000",
    "enrollmentId": "SEMI-2025-4231",
    "studentName": "Priya Nair",
    "contactNumber": "9876543210",
    "instituteName": "City General Hospital",
    "courseName": "Emergency Medicine",
    "batchYear": 2025,
    "subjects": ["Anatomy","Physiology","Emergency Medicine"],
    "examDate": "2026-09-15T00:00:00.000Z",
    "examVenue": "Examination Hall A, Mumbai",
    "examCenter": "Mumbai Central Examination Hub",
    "reportingTime": "08:30 AM",
    "isDownloaded": false
  }
}

request.description:
UC 4.3 — Returns full hall ticket data and marks isDownloaded=true + sets downloadedAt timestamp.

Idempotent: re-calling does not reset isDownloaded.

Frontend uses this data to render a printable PDF hall ticket.

Access: institute (own), board, admin, super_admin

response.name: 200 Downloaded
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Hall ticket data ready for download. Use this data to render a printable PDF.",
  "data": {
    "ticketId": "HT-SEMI-2025-4231-1719400000000",
    "enrollmentId": "SEMI-2025-4231",
    "studentName": "Priya Nair",
    "contactNumber": "9876543210",
    "photoUrl": "https://res.cloudinary.com/.../photo.jpg",
    "instituteName": "City General Hospital",
    "instituteAddress": "123 MG Road, Mumbai",
    "courseName": "Emergency Medicine",
    "batchYear": 2025,
    "subjects": ["Anatomy","Physiology","Emergency Medicine"],
    "examDate": "2026-09-15T00:00:00.000Z",
    "examVenue": "Examination Hall A, Mumbai Convention Centre",
    "examCenter": "Mumbai Central Examination Hub",
    "reportingTime": "08:30 AM",
    "isDownloaded": true,
    "downloadedAt": "2026-06-26T13:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
